arts.ttl: Ten Hag kicked 'special player' out of Man Utd
arts.sum: Former Man Utd first-team coach Benni McCarthy, who worked with Sancho at the club from 2022 to 2024, says that Ten Hag have sold a special player. Erik ten Hag kicked out a "special player" when he sold Jadon Sancho to Chelsea, according to Benni McCarthy.

arts.ttl: Manchester United ‘register interest’ in Premier League centre-back
arts.sum: Manchester United have reportedly registered an interest in signing Aston Villa centre-back Pau Torres. Torres has been an important part of Aston Villa’s progress under the management of Unai Emery, helping The Villans to a top-four finish and Champions League qualification last season.
